settings.heading: The art of sleep.
settings.text: Designed to transform your bedroom into a quiet sanctuary of restful serenity.
settings.trust_items: Free delivery | 7 day returns | Cash on delivery available | Delivered in 48 hours

settings.heading: Woven, not knitted.
settings.intro: Ordinary premium bedding is knitted: crisp, flat, formal. Ours is woven.
settings.text: Woven gives cotton a different life — a soft, slightly elastic, three-dimensional hand that breathes in summer and holds warmth in winter. It drapes instead of lying stiff, and softens further with every wash rather than wearing thin. It is, simply, the most touchable bed you will own.

settings.heading: Build your sleepscape
settings.subtext: Tap a piece to add it — build the layered look in one go.

settings.heading: Shop by category
settings.subtext: One knitted-cotton family, three ways to layer your bed — across nine shades drawn from the earth.

settings.text: Premium knitted-cotton bedding for hotels, resorts, designers, architects and developers — with trade pricing, custom shades and reliable supply.
